steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank is a verb that must agree with its subject. The subject of the blank is "re-entering one of the checkers into the game" — a gerund phrase. Gerund phrases always function as singular subjects.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'follows': Singular verb; agrees with the singular gerund-phrase subject. ✓
  • Choice B — 'are following': Plural verb and present-progressive tense; neither agrees with a singular subject nor fits the simple-present context. ✗
  • Choice C — 'have followed': Plural verb in present-perfect tense; fails subject-verb agreement and shifts tense unnecessarily. ✗
  • Choice D — 'follow': Bare infinitive / plural form; does not agree with a singular subject. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
